arts.ttl: Man Utd OUT, Chelsea IN: Liverpool face new threat for €50m superstar
arts.sum: Man Utd held a long-standing interest in the Hungary international, but Ben Jacobs reports that they are not expected to pursue a move for Kerkez given that they signed Patrick Dorgu in the January transfer window. The Bournemouth left-back has emerged as one of the Premier League's most sought-after prospects since joining the Cherries in 2023.

arts.ttl: What Time Does Liverpool Play Today? Champions League vs. PSG (Mar. 5)
arts.sum: Liverpool travel to France to take on Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League round of 16.

arts.ttl: Liverpool on course to break £700m barrier that could alter Man City dynamic
arts.sum: Liverpool made a £57m loss for 2023/24 but are set for a bumper financial year for 2024/25

arts.ttl: Five Liverpool stars drop early team news hints for PSG as Cody Gakpo decision made
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool team news ahead of their Champions League showdown with Paris Saint-Germain.

arts.ttl: 'Very close': Mohamed Salah names the player who was like an 'older brother' to him during his time at Chelsea
Liverpool urged to sign Man City star as shock replacement for Virgil van Dijk
arts.sum: Van Dijk’s current contract at Anfield expires at the end of the season

arts.ttl: Liverpool said to have made €100m ‘monster offer’ with loan condition attached
arts.sum: Liverpool made an effort to sign Khvicha Kvaratskhelia from Napoli in the January transfer window, before his big move to Paris Saint Germain. That’s according to Gianluca di Marzio, who provides information on Liverpool’s apparent bid ahead of the clash with PSG in the Champions League this evening. arts.ttl: Liverpool threatened with points deduction as Arsenal target striker - 5 possible twists
arts.sum: Liverpool are growingly increasingly likely to lift the Premier League trophy, but Mirror Football brings you several twists and turns that could breathe new life into the season

arts.ttl: PSG vs Liverpool: the Champions League’s novelty heavyweight knockout game
arts.sum: Considering Paris Saint-Germain and Liverpool are two of Europe’s top clubs, and have been for a (varying) number of years, makes it relatively bizarre they have only ever met four times, just twice in the Champions League, and never in the knockout stages. Liverpool, on the other hand, are one of Europe’s most decorated clubs, winning the European Cup/Champions League six times .

arts.ttl: Liverpool could be given free run at transfer – Reds speaking to player’s camp
arts.sum: Liverpool may be handed a free shot at Wolfsburg’s Mohamed Amoura this summer as Eintracht Frankfurt are unlikely to move for him. Florian Plettenberg covers the player today and how he is ‘one to watch’ for the summer transfer window after his impressive season in the Bundesliga so far.
